rationale: Startup env seeding now refreshes the canonical GITHUB_TOKEN managed secret from the preferred GitHub env token so stale alias switches cannot leave runtime auth on an outdated stored token.
Top-level Codex review summary only; the actionable inline finding was handled directly.
Startup env seeding now imports every nonblank GitHub token alias present instead of stopping at the first one, and tests cover multi-alias import behavior.
Top-level Gemini review summary only; the underlying inline suggestion was addressed in code and tests.
Added startup secret env-seeding coverage for GH_TOKEN and GITHUB_PAT, including canonical GITHUB_TOKEN refresh semantics.
Whitespace-only env values are now normalized away before import so they cannot create active managed secrets or suppress the dashboard warning.
Copilot PR overview only; it did not introduce an additional actionable request beyond the inline comments already classified.
Removed the startup log detail derived from the managed-secret candidate map so the sync path no longer emits secret-adjacent data that GitHub Advanced Security flags as clear-text logging.
